category_sources: source_facts.description says Process Management Interface for HPC environments; official OpenPMIx site calls it a PMIx reference implementation.
display_name_sources: Official OpenPMIx site and documentation use the project name PMIx/OpenPMIx; source_facts.name is pmix.
docs_sources: Official OpenPMIx documentation is hosted at docs.openpmix.org; official site links support, FAQ, and how-to guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/openpmix/openpmix, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify PMIx tools for HPC process management; official site describes the PMIx reference implementation.
